caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT!" printed on the front, a black baseball cap, and over-ear headphones sits in a podcast studio. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone and wears a gold chain. The background features a white wall with gold stars and the words "EMPIRE HUSTLE" repeated. To the right, a screen displays the words "BOSS TALK 101" and "BOSS TALK 101" is also visible as a graphic overlay on the bottom right. On the bottom left, a logo reads "STUDIO PODCAST". As the sequence progresses, the man remains seated, shifting his gaze slightly and adjusting his facial expression while looking toward someone off-camera. His mouth remains closed throughout the frames, and he maintains a steady posture, with the lighting and equipment remaining constant across the scene.
